titleStmt.title: SII 23.144: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 144. (A.R. No. 144 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Rock-cut cave—on the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 18: 1285-86 A.D.

summary.p: This is a mutilated record of Māṟavarman Kulaśēkhara “who took every country”. It registers an endowment of land for providing for offerings to the deity during the early morning service in the temple, by three residents of Sundaraśōḻapuram in Ollaiyūr-kūṟṟam a division of Teṉ-Kōṉāḍu in Kaḍalaḍaiyād-ilaṅgaikoṇḍa-Śōḻa vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmar Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya kulacekara
tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 8Āvatu koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyā tilaṅkaiko
ṇṭacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu teṉkoṉāṭṭu Ollaiyūrk kūṟṟattuc
cuntaracoḻapurattu kūṭaluṭaiyārkaḷil periyāṉ Irā
caṉāṉa Irācarāca cilaiceṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭārum periyāṉ tayilaṉ
kā ṉāṭiti Uḷḷiṭṭāru mūrperiyāpiḷḷāṉāṉa pukalpperumāḷum Im
muvaruḷḷiṭṭārum tiruppūvālaikkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyaṉār tiruppaḷḷi
eḻuccikku Amutukku tevval vayakkal Iraṇṭiṉālum vaṭatalai kuṟucciyā ḷḷa kuḷamum vaṭa
malum Akaḷaṅka Ācci kkum pala viñcaṉamumStops here incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
